violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. The sanitizer solution container appeared diluted and was changed out to new bottle. New chlorine sanitizer was attempted to be primed, no sanitizer was coming through the tube. Dish machine to be serviced and tested. All dishes/utensils must be sanitized in 3-bay sink until dish machine is adequately dispensing chlorine sanitizer (50-100 ppm) New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2026

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Old rodent droppings were observed in the corner of the dry storage area. Area to be cleaned and monitored. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Ice machine was turned off. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Corned beef was marked with a date that exceeds 7 days. Corned beef was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan have an accumulation of dust. Fan to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
